faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: The questions we hear most from US patients making the trip.

items.a: We only partner with Korean MoHW-licensed clinics. You'll get the full surgical plan in English plus a signed agreement before you fly.
An English-speaking coordinator is with you from consult to recovery — and stays with you on WhatsApp once you're back home.

items.q: What if something happens after I fly back?
items.a: Aftercare runs for the full warranty window of each procedure via WhatsApp. If needed, we'll refer you to a partner US dermatologist.

items.q: How long should I stay in Seoul?
items.a: Anywhere from 3 to 10 days depending on the procedure. We plan flights, stay, and transport with you.
No deposit to book. You pay the clinic directly on the day — card or cash, your choice.
Reschedule up to 48 hours before. If a visa or flight issue pops up, message us right away.
